clips.title: Morning Pull
clips.prompt: Natural realistic photography, true-to-life, present day. A sunny neighborhood cafe, wooden counter, espresso machine, plants in the window. Morning, warm daylight. A person in an apron and rolled sleeves pulls a shot of espresso, watching the stream. A portafilter, milk pitcher, stacked cups. Soft window daylight, natural color, gentle contrast. 50mm, slow dolly in. Authentic, fine natural detail, 24fps.

clips.title: Harvest Hour
clips.prompt: Natural realistic photography, true-to-life, present day. A wide farm field of tall wheat at golden hour, a distant barn, open sky. Late afternoon, light breeze. A person in a flannel shirt and work jeans stands among the stalks, hand brushing the grain, looking out. A worn cap, gloves, a fence line. Warm low sun, natural warm color, soft shadows. 35mm, static wide. Authentic, natural grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Platform
clips.prompt: Natural realistic photography, true-to-life, present day. A city subway platform, tiled walls, an arriving train blurred, overhead signage. Daytime, fluorescent light. A person in a everyday jacket with a shoulder bag stands near the edge, checking the arrivals board. A coffee cup, a phone, yellow floor line. Cool station light, natural color, realistic contrast. 35mm, slow dolly in. Authentic, natural detail, 24fps.

clips.title: Afternoon Walk
clips.prompt: Natural realistic photography, true-to-life, present day. A leafy city park path, dappled sunlight, benches, a fountain beyond. Afternoon, mild. A person in a light sweater pushes a stroller along the path, glancing down at it. A tote bag, fallen leaves, a distant dog walker. Soft dappled daylight, natural color, gentle contrast. 50mm, side tracking. Authentic, natural detail, 24fps.

clips.title: High Steel
clips.prompt: Natural realistic photography, true-to-life, present day. A high-rise construction rooftop, steel beams, the city sprawling below. Midday, clear. A person in a hard hat and hi-vis vest stands on the deck checking a beam, tool belt on. Rebar, a coiled hose, safety rails. Hard midday sun, natural color, crisp shadows. 28mm, slow crane rise. Authentic, natural detail, 24fps.

clips.title: Market Day
clips.prompt: Natural realistic photography, true-to-life, present day. A busy open-air market, crates of produce, hanging awnings, crowds behind. Morning, bright. A person in an apron arranges fruit at a stall, calling out, mid-gesture. Wooden crates, a hanging scale, paper bags. Natural morning light, vivid natural color. 35mm, handheld push in. Authentic, natural grain, 24fps.

clips.title: First Mile
clips.prompt: Natural realistic photography, true-to-life, present day. A coastal running path at sunrise, sea on one side, dunes on the other. Dawn, cool. A person in running gear jogs along the path, breath visible, steady stride. A fitness watch, a water bottle clip, gulls. Soft pink dawn light, natural cool-to-warm color. 35mm, side tracking. Authentic, natural detail, 24fps.

clips.title: Third Period
clips.prompt: Natural realistic photography, true-to-life, present day. A bright classroom, a whiteboard covered in diagrams, desks in rows behind. Daytime. A person in smart-casual clothes writes on the whiteboard, mid-explanation, marker in hand. A globe, stacked books, a coffee mug. Soft window daylight, natural color, realistic contrast. 50mm, slow dolly in. Authentic, natural detail, 24fps.

clips.title: The Garage
clips.prompt: Natural realistic photography, true-to-life, present day. An auto repair garage, a car on a lift, tool chests, work lamps. Daytime. A person in coveralls wipes their hands on a rag, looking up at the underbody. An impact wrench, oil pan, hanging air hose. Mixed work-lamp and daylight, natural color. 35mm, slow dolly in. Authentic, natural detail, 24fps.

clips.title: The Corridor
clips.prompt: Natural realistic photography, true-to-life, present day. A hospital corridor, clean floors, doorways, a nurses' station beyond. Daytime, even light. A person in medical scrubs walks the corridor with a clipboard, glancing at a chart. A lanyard, a wall clock, a med cart. Even clinical daylight, natural neutral color. 35mm, side tracking. Authentic, natural detail, 24fps.

clips.title: Mending Nets
clips.prompt: Natural realistic photography, true-to-life, present day. A weathered wooden pier, moored fishing boats, coiled rope, gulls. Late afternoon. A person in a knit sweater sits mending a net across their lap, hands working the twine. Buoys, a tackle box, a thermos. Soft overcast daylight, natural muted color. 50mm, static. Authentic, natural detail, 24fps.

clips.title: Balcony Dusk
clips.prompt: Natural realistic photography, true-to-life, present day. A small apartment balcony at dusk, potted plants, string of a city beyond, a mug on the rail. Evening, calm. A person in a cozy cardigan sits reading a book, legs tucked up. A blanket, a cup of tea, warm window light behind. Soft dusk light with warm interior glow, natural color. 35mm, slow dolly in. Authentic, natural detail, 24fps.
